title: 6723 - Quality Assurance Technician [ Chemical Industry]
description:
• Working Days: Monday - Friday 830am to 530pm
  • Working Location: Tuas

Job Responsibilities

  • Reports to QA Supervisor and Assistant QA Engineer
  • Adhere and comply to company and department quality and safety standards and policies
  • Carry out all laboratory tests and measurements accurately (related to raw material) in accordance to approved procedure and wis
  • Prepares Certificate of Analysis for outgoing product and be involved in related work activities in accordance to approved procedure and flow
  • Handle incoming/outgoing check in accordance to procedure and ensure all related records are maintained
  • Handle/process all ISO Documentation under QA Section responsibility and ensure retrievability at all times
  • Accurately process and/or maintain required test data in accordance to approved procedure and flow
  • Perform housekeeping and maintain 5S in accordance to the department requirements
  • Participate in external provider management
  • Assist in audit preparation
  • Accurately update Statistical Process Control (SPC) charts and monitor incoming to outgoing processes in accordance to the Section's documented requirements
  • Assist in the practical training of QA related activities when required
  • Assist in the generation and maintenance of training records for department staff
  • Assist to check, receive and retain non-routine samples for analysis as per requirement
  • Assist in receiving QA related purchases and tally with Purchase Order & Delivery Order
  • Check and report for near-misses to the Supervisor/Engineer and provide work improvement (QEHS) suggestions
  • Support the QC Section in its activities as and when required
  • Perform any other tasks as instructed by the Supervisor or Engineer
  • Perform any other tasks as assigned by Section Manager / HOD

Job Requirements

  • Diploma in Chemical or related field



📲 Interested candidates, please WhatsApp your resume to: +65 9642 0989 (Han)
📧 Or email your resume to: supreme.cc.han@gmail.com

👤 Chaw Chiaw Han | R22106723 🏢 The Supreme HR Advisory Pte Ltd | EA 14C7279
